lint.output: 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (addEdge unused) — known acceptable per LEARNINGS.md. Zero new warnings.

build.output: No separate build step run; tsc covers type correctness

unit_tests.output: No unit tests exist for UI route components

notes: Playbook mode implemented as distraction-free view. workspace-shell.tsx detects /playbook path and early-returns with WorkspaceProvider only (no Sidebar, Header, or TabBar) — all React hooks are called unconditionally before the conditional return, no hook-order violation. PlaybookView shows one step at a time large/centered with: progress bar + N/M counter, dot navigation (green=completed, white=current, muted=pending), Prev/Next arrow buttons, Mark Complete & Next primary action (xl Button), green CheckCircle2 + completion timestamp for completed steps, back link to runbook view. Mobile-responsive via sm: breakpoints. Server page.tsx reads runbookId from searchParams, fetches runbook + runbook_steps joined to steps(id,name). RunbookStepEnriched type defined locally (same shape as runbook-view.tsx). sidebar.tsx Workflows active function updated to exclude /playbook. 'playbook' added to workspace-shell reserved paths array.
